withdrawalNotImplemented: Nomination withdrawal not yet implemented. Contact a representative.
electionCompleted: Election completed successfully! New representatives have been assigned.
confirmCompleteBootstrap: Please confirm that you want to complete bootstrap mode
electionCreatedWithNomination: Election created. Start the nomination period to allow candidates to nominate themselves.
proposalStatusCannotBeStarted: Proposal is in {{status}} status and cannot be started
proposalDeclined: Proposal declined. The proposer has been notified.
confirmProceedWarning:
Warning: {{message}}

Do you want to proceed?
confirmProceedConflict:
Conflict: {{message}}

Do you want to proceed anyway?
proposalCreatedSuccessRepresentative: Rule change proposal created successfully! You can start voting on it now.
proposalCreatedSuccessMember: Rule change proposal created successfully! A representative will review and start voting when ready.
proposalCreatedDescriptionRepresentative: Go to "View Rules" to start the voting period.
proposalCreatedDescriptionMember: You can view your proposal in the "My Proposals" section.
declineRuleProposalDescription: Provide a reason for declining this rule proposal. The proposer will receive this reason via email.
completeVoteConfirmDescription: This will finalize the vote and calculate results. The vote status will be updated to either "passed" or "failed" based on the threshold and quorum requirements.

electionResults.quorumNotReachedDescription: This election did not meet the minimum participation requirement and cannot be completed. A new election may need to be called.
electionResults.title: Election Results - {{title}}
electionResults.description: Final results and outcome of the representative election
electionResults.noResultsHint: Results will appear once voting begins.
electionResults.newRepresentativesDesc: These candidates have been elected to serve as organization representatives
electionResults.completeDesc: Election has ended and quorum was reached. Representatives can now be officially assigned.
electionResults.assignRepresentatives: Assign elected candidates as organization representatives
electionResults.updateTerms: Update representative terms and expiration dates
electionResults.notifyMembers: Notify all organization members of the results

electionVoting.onlyActiveMembersCanVote: Only active organization members can vote in elections.
electionVoting.thankYouParticipating: Thank you for participating in this election. Your vote has been recorded anonymously.
electionVoting.thankYouParticipatingPublic: Thank you for participating in this election. Your vote has been recorded and is visible to organization members.
electionVoting.noCandidatesNominated: No candidates have been nominated yet.
electionVoting.checkBackOrNominate: Check back later or consider nominating yourself.
electionVoting.confirmFinalVote: I confirm this is my final vote and understand it cannot be changed
electionVoting.confirmFinalVotePublic: I confirm this is my final vote. It will be recorded publicly with my membership and cannot be changed
electionVoting.publicVoteNotice: This election uses public voting. Your ballot will be visible to organization members after you vote.

ruleProposalVoting.title: Vote on Rule Change
ruleProposalVoting.subtitle: {{name}} governance proposal
ruleProposalVoting.alreadyVoted: You have already voted on this proposal
ruleProposalVoting.voteDetermines: Your vote will determine if this rule change is approved

tab.title: Governance
tab.subtitle: Manage governance rules and elections
tab.createElectionHint: Create an election to select new representatives
tab.noNomineesNominationHint: Members can nominate candidates during the nomination period.
tab.noNomineesDraftHint: Start the nomination period to allow candidates to nominate themselves.
tab.electionDraftAlert: Election is in draft. Start the nomination period to allow candidates to nominate themselves.
tab.electionNominationAlert: Nomination period is open. Members can nominate candidates until voting begins.

tooltips.statusAndPermissions: Your permissions are determined by your role and the organization's governance rules.

ruleImpacts.representativeTermMonths: Affects when new elections are scheduled
ruleImpacts.electionVotingMethod: Affects how election winners are determined
ruleImpacts.electionNoticeDays: Affects election scheduling and member preparation time
ruleImpacts.defaultVotingDeadlineHours: Affects how long members have to vote on proposals
ruleImpacts.defaultQuorumPercentage: Affects quorum requirements for all non-election votes
ruleImpacts.defaultAcceptanceThreshold: Affects all new organizational documents. Higher threshold = more votes needed for approval
ruleImpacts.documentProposalPeriodDays: Affects all new organizational documents. Longer period = more time for proposals and edits
ruleImpacts.paragraphProposalCutoffDays: Affects all new organizational documents. Earlier cutoff = less time for paragraph proposals
ruleImpacts.thresholdCalculationMethod: Affects all new organizational documents. "All Members" requires higher participation to meet thresholds
ruleImpacts.anonymousVotingEnabled: Affects all new organizational documents and votes. Anonymous voting protects voter privacy
ruleImpacts.voteChangeAllowed: Affects all new organizational documents. Flexible voting allows reconsideration, locked voting prevents changes
ruleImpacts.representativeCanCreateVotes: Affects representative powers and governance workflow
ruleImpacts.representativeCanInviteMembers: Affects organization growth and membership management
ruleImpacts.representativeCanManageDocuments: Affects document creation and management permissions
ruleImpacts.representativeApprovalRequired: Affects voting workflow and representative oversight
ruleImpacts.auditTrailEnabled: Affects transparency and ability to review organization history
ruleImpacts.membersCanProposeRules: Affects who can initiate rule changes. Enabling this democratizes rule-making
ruleImpacts.membersCanProposeRulesThreshold: Affects difficulty of passing member-proposed rule changes. Higher threshold = more votes needed
ruleImpacts.membersCanCreateDocuments: Affects document creation permissions. Enabling this allows all members to contribute documents
ruleImpacts.membersCanCreateDocumentsThreshold: Affects difficulty of passing member-created documents. Higher threshold = more votes needed
ruleImpacts.membersCanInitializeElections: Affects election initiation. Enabling this allows members to trigger elections when needed
ruleImpacts.membersCanInitializeElectionsThreshold: Affects difficulty of passing member-initiated elections. Higher threshold = more votes needed
ruleImpacts.membersCanInviteMembers: Affects membership growth. Enabling this allows all members to help grow the organization
ruleImpacts.membersCanInviteMembersThreshold: Affects difficulty of passing member invitations. Higher threshold = more votes needed
ruleImpacts.membersCanManageRuleProposals: Affects proposal workflow. Enabling this allows members to manage the full proposal lifecycle
ruleImpacts.membersCanManageRuleProposalsThreshold: Affects difficulty of passing member-managed proposals. Higher threshold = more votes needed
ruleImpacts.defaultStructureProposalsEnabled: Affects whether new documents allow structure proposals by default
ruleImpacts.defaultVotingAnonymityLocked: Affects whether anonymity settings are locked by default on new documents
ruleImpacts.minimumQuorumPercentage: Sets the floor for participation required before votes can pass
ruleImpacts.minimumApprovalThreshold: Sets the floor for approval percentage required before votes can pass
ruleImpacts.minimumVotingPeriodHours: Sets the minimum hours voting must remain open before it can close
ruleImpacts.membersCanInitiateMistrustVote: Affects whether members can initiate votes to remove representatives
ruleImpacts.mistrustVoteThreshold: Affects how many PRO votes are required to remove a representative via mistrust vote
ruleImpacts.mistrustVoteQuorumPercentage: Affects minimum participation required for a valid mistrust vote

bootstrapBanner.title: Bootstrap Mode Active
bootstrapBanner.description: Your organization is setting up its governance constitution. Vote on core rules to complete the bootstrap process.

recoveryBanner.title: Recovery Mode Active
recoveryBanner.description: Your organization is in recovery mode. This mode provides additional permissions to help restore normal governance.

reasons.no_representatives_and_members_cannot_ma: No representatives and members cannot manage proposals

permissions.manageProposals: All active members can propose and manage rule proposals
permissions.createDocuments: All active members can create documents
permissions.initializeElections: All active members can initialize elections
permissions.inviteMembers: All active members can invite new members

recoveryBanner.autoExitHint: Recovery mode will automatically exit once normal governance is restored.

draft.label: Draft
draft.description: Proposal is being prepared and has not started voting
draft.nextSteps: A representative can start voting when ready

active.label: Active
active.description: Voting is currently open for this proposal
active.nextSteps: Members can vote on this proposal

approved.label: Approved
approved.description: Proposal has been approved by voters
approved.nextSteps: The rule change can now be implemented

rejected.label: Rejected
rejected.nextSteps: This proposal will not be implemented

expired.label: Expired
expired.description: Voting deadline has passed without reaching threshold
expired.nextSteps: This proposal did not meet the required threshold

implemented.label: Implemented
implemented.description: Proposal has been implemented and rule change is active
implemented.nextSteps: The rule change is now in effect

electionCreation.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose and context of this election
electionCreation.title: Create Representative Election
electionCreation.description: Call a democratic election for representative positions in {{name}}
electionCreation.timelineDesc: Set the schedule for nominations and voting
electionCreation.noticeAlert: Elections must be announced at least {{days}} days in advance according to governance rules.
electionCreation.nominationDeadlineHelp: Last day for candidates to nominate themselves

validation.positionsMin: At least 1 position must be available
validation.termMin: Term must be at least 1 month
validation.startFuture: Voting start date must be in the future
validation.endAfterStart: Voting end date must be after start date
validation.nominationBeforeStart: Nomination deadline must be before voting starts

candidateNomination.nominationStatementPlaceholder: Why do you want to serve as a representative? What experience or qualifications do you bring?
candidateNomination.qualificationsPlaceholder: List any relevant experience, skills, or background...
candidateNomination.experiencePlaceholder: Describe any leadership, governance, or organizational experience...
candidateNomination.title: Candidate Nominations - {{title}}
candidateNomination.description: Organization members can nominate themselves to run for representative positions
candidateNomination.accessDeniedDesc: Only active organization members can participate in nominations.
candidateNomination.readyToRunDesc: Nominate yourself for a representative position in this election.
candidateNomination.alreadySubmitted: You have already submitted a nomination for this election.
candidateNomination.periodEnded: The nomination period for this election has ended.
candidateNomination.submitYourNominationDesc: Tell the organization why you want to serve as a representative
candidateNomination.statementHelp: This will be visible to all organization members voting in the election.
candidateNomination.reviewNotice: Your nomination will be reviewed by current representatives before being approved. You will be notified of the decision.
candidateNomination.noCandidates: No candidates have been nominated yet.
candidateNomination.beFirst: Be the first to submit your nomination!

representativeTermMonths.label: Representative Term Length
representativeTermMonths.description: How long representatives serve before needing re-election

electionVotingMethod.label: Election Voting Method
electionVotingMethod.description: How votes are counted in elections

electionQuorumPercentage.label: Election Quorum
electionQuorumPercentage.description: Minimum participation required for valid election

defaultVotingDeadlineHours.label: Default Voting Deadline
defaultVotingDeadlineHours.description: Default time for votes to remain open

defaultAcceptanceThreshold.label: Document Acceptance Threshold
defaultAcceptanceThreshold.description: Percentage of PRO votes required for document proposals to be automatically accepted (1-100%)

documentProposalPeriodDays.label: Document Proposal Period
documentProposalPeriodDays.description: Number of days documents remain in proposal status before voting begins

paragraphProposalCutoffDays.label: Paragraph Proposal Cutoff
paragraphProposalCutoffDays.description: Days before proposal deadline when new paragraph proposals are locked

thresholdCalculationMethod.label: Threshold Calculation Method
thresholdCalculationMethod.description: How approval percentage is calculated: "All Votes" uses percentage of votes cast, "All Members" uses percentage of all eligible members

voteChangeAllowed.label: Vote Changes Allowed
voteChangeAllowed.description: Allow members to change their votes

representativeCanCreateVotes.label: Representatives Can Create Votes
representativeCanCreateVotes.description: Representatives can create votes for organizational decisions

representativeCanManageDocuments.label: Representatives Can Manage Documents
representativeCanManageDocuments.description: Representatives can create and manage organization documents

representativeApprovalRequired.label: Representative Approval Required
representativeApprovalRequired.description: Representative approval needed for major actions

membersCanProposeRules.label: Members Can Propose Rules
membersCanProposeRules.description: Allow members to propose rule changes

membersCanManageRuleProposals.label: Members Can Manage Rule Proposals
membersCanManageRuleProposals.description: Allow members to manage rule proposals

membersCanProposeRulesThreshold.label: Members Can Propose Rules Threshold
membersCanProposeRulesThreshold.description: Minimum approval percentage (0-100%) required when members propose rule changes

membersCanCreateDocumentsThreshold.label: Members Can Create Documents Threshold
membersCanCreateDocumentsThreshold.description: Minimum approval percentage (0-100%) required when members create documents

membersCanInitializeElectionsThreshold.label: Members Can Initialize Elections Threshold
membersCanInitializeElectionsThreshold.description: Minimum approval percentage (0-100%) required when members initialize elections

membersCanInviteMembersThreshold.label: Members Can Invite Members Threshold
membersCanInviteMembersThreshold.description: Minimum approval percentage (0-100%) required when members invite new members

membersCanManageRuleProposalsThreshold.label: Members Can Manage Rule Proposals Threshold
membersCanManageRuleProposalsThreshold.description: Minimum approval percentage (0-100%) required when members manage rule proposals

defaultStructureProposalsEnabled.label: Default Structure Proposals Enabled
defaultStructureProposalsEnabled.description: Whether new documents allow structure proposals by default

defaultVotingAnonymityLocked.label: Default Voting Anonymity Locked
defaultVotingAnonymityLocked.description: Whether anonymity settings are locked by default on new documents

minimumQuorumPercentage.label: Minimum Quorum
minimumQuorumPercentage.description: Floor for participation required before votes can pass (organization-configurable)

minimumApprovalThreshold.label: Minimum Approval Threshold
minimumApprovalThreshold.description: Floor for approval percentage required before votes can pass (organization-configurable)

minimumVotingPeriodHours.label: Minimum Voting Period
minimumVotingPeriodHours.description: Minimum hours voting must remain open before it can close

membersCanInitiateMistrustVote.label: Members Can Initiate Mistrust Vote
membersCanInitiateMistrustVote.description: Allow members to initiate votes to remove representatives

mistrustVoteThreshold.label: Mistrust Vote Threshold
mistrustVoteThreshold.description: Percentage of PRO votes required to remove a representative via mistrust vote

mistrustVoteQuorumPercentage.label: Mistrust Vote Quorum
mistrustVoteQuorumPercentage.description: Minimum participation required for a valid mistrust vote

votingMethods.ranked_choiceDesc: Voters rank candidates in order of preference
votingMethods.approvalDesc: Voters approve any number of candidates

bootstrapCompletionDialog.title: Complete Bootstrap Mode
bootstrapCompletionDialog.description: Manually complete the bootstrap process for your organization.
bootstrapCompletionDialog.lockRules: Current governance rules will be locked in
bootstrapCompletionDialog.normalRules: Normal governance rules will apply going forward
bootstrapCompletionDialog.confirmLabel: I understand that completing bootstrap will lock in the current governance rules

representativeRejectDialog.charCount: {{count}}/2000 characters. The proposer will receive this reason via email.
representativeRejectDialog.reasonRequired: Please provide a reason for declining.
representativeRejectDialog.reasonTooLong: Reason must be 2000 characters or less.
representativeRejectDialog.failedToDecline: Failed to decline. Please try again.

completeVoteButton.label: Complete vote
completeVoteButton.title: Complete vote
completeVoteButton.defaultDescription: This will close voting and apply the outcome based on current votes.
completeVoteButton.tooltipReady: Close voting and apply outcome based on current votes
completeVoteButton.tooltipQuorum: Participation threshold must be met before completing the vote
completeVoteButton.tooltipDeferred: Voting stays open until the deadline when vote changes are allowed

votingDeferredUntilDeadline: Voting stays open until {{deadline}} because vote changes are allowed.
votingOnTrackForApproval: Current votes would approve the document if voting closed now.

rulesPanel.title: Governance Rules
rulesPanel.subtitle: Review rules, vote on proposals, and manage the organization's governance settings.
rulesPanel.searchPlaceholder: Search rules by name or description...
rulesPanel.overviewAlert: Click on any rule to propose a change or vote on active proposals. Changes require member approval to take effect.
rulesPanel.noRulesMatch: No rules match your search criteria. Try adjusting your filters.
rulesPanel.activeProposalsDesc: Rule changes currently being voted on by members
rulesPanel.pendingProposalsDescRep: Rule change proposals awaiting your approval to start voting
rulesPanel.pendingProposalsDescMember: Rule change proposals awaiting representative approval
rulesPanel.awaitingApproval: Awaiting representative approval to start voting
rulesPanel.emptyProposals: No proposals found. Create a proposal by clicking on a rule in the "All Rules" tab.
rulesPanel.rulesNotConfigured: Governance rules have not been configured for this organization yet.
rulesPanel.needActiveMember: You need to be an active member to propose rules.
rulesPanel.onlyRepresentatives: Only representatives can propose rules in this organization.

categoryDescriptions.Elections: Configure how representatives are elected and serve
categoryDescriptions.Voting: Default settings for all organization votes and decisions
categoryDescriptions.Safeguards: Organization-configurable floors for quorum, approval, and voting duration

governanceRulesDialog.title: Governance Rules Configuration
governanceRulesDialog.description: Configure democratic governance rules for {{name}}. These rules apply to all organization documents and elections.
governanceRulesDialog.representativeElectionsDesc: Configure how representatives are elected and serve
governanceRulesDialog.termLengthHelp: How long representatives serve before needing re-election
governanceRulesDialog.termLimitsHelp: Maximum consecutive terms (leave empty for no limit)
governanceRulesDialog.electionQuorumHelp: Minimum participation required for valid election
governanceRulesDialog.generalVotingRulesDesc: Default settings for all organization votes and decisions
governanceRulesDialog.defaultDeadlineHelp: Default time for votes to remain open
governanceRulesDialog.voteChangesAllowedHelp: Allow members to change their votes
governanceRulesDialog.createVotesHelp: Representatives can create votes for organizational decisions
governanceRulesDialog.manageDocumentsHelp: Representatives can create and manage organization documents
governanceRulesDialog.approvalRequiredHelp: Representative approval needed for major actions
governanceRulesDialog.importantNoticeBody: Changes to governance rules affect all current and future organization documents and elections. Consider the impact on ongoing processes.

ruleProposalDialog.title: Propose Governance Rule Change
ruleProposalDialog.descriptionRep: Propose a change to {{name}}'s governance rules. As a representative, your proposal can be voted on directly.
ruleProposalDialog.descriptionMember: Propose a change to {{name}}'s governance rules. As a member, your proposal will need representative approval before voting begins.
ruleProposalDialog.descriptionSuffix: All proposals are voted on by organization members.
ruleProposalDialog.proposalDetailsDesc: Describe the rule change you want to propose
ruleProposalDialog.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Extend representative terms to 18 months
ruleProposalDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain the reasoning and expected impact of this change
ruleProposalDialog.multipleChoiceDesc: Present multiple options for members to choose from
ruleProposalDialog.singleValueDesc: Propose a single new value for this rule
ruleProposalDialog.noOptionsHint: Click "Add Option" to create voting choices
ruleProposalDialog.voteNotice: This proposal will be voted on by all active organization members. If approved, the governance rule will be immediately updated.
ruleProposalDialog.documentImpactBody: This rule affects all new organizational documents created after the change. Existing documents will keep their current settings.
ruleProposalDialog.considerImpact: Consider the impact on ongoing elections, votes, and organization operations.

validation.optionsMin: At least 2 options are required for multiple choice
validation.thresholdRange: Acceptance threshold must be between 1 and 100
validation.proposalPeriod: Document proposal period must be a positive integer (days)
validation.cutoffRange: Paragraph proposal cutoff must be an integer between 0 and 365 days
validation.thresholdMethod: Threshold calculation method must be either "all_votes" or "all_members"

ruleHistory.title: Rule Change History
ruleHistory.description: View the history of all governance rule changes for this organization
ruleHistory.empty: No rule changes have been made yet. Rule changes will appear here once proposals are approved.
